name: SELECT Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Dining, utility bills, and online spends

exclusions: fuel transactions do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points are subject to monthly cap
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: First year fee reversal on spending Rs 7,500 within first 60 days
Annual fee waiver on spending Rs 70,000 in a year
additionalBenefits: Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Current official product page does not publish a detailed salaried eligibility grid
Approval remains subject to BOBCARD credit assessment
Resident Indian applicants can proceed through the official application flow
selfEmployed: Current official product page does not publish a detailed self-employed eligibility grid
Approval remains subject to BOBCARD credit assessment
Resident Indian applicants can proceed through the official application flow

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Audited against the official Bank of Baroda Select product page on 2026-06-14.

The current official page confirms 5 reward points per Rs 100 on dining, utility bills, and online spends, 1 reward point per Rs 100 on other eligible spends, and a 1,000 reward-point monthly cap on the 5X categories.
The official product page currently shows 'Coming soon...' under detailed eligibility, document, and terms sections.
